t15: Top up your balance using any of the available methods (₽, $, ¥).
t16: Choose a suitable plan and purchase a subscription.
t17: Copy your subscription link and paste it into the installed app.
t18: What to do if the app is unavailable in the App Store.
t19:
App Store unavailability may be due to regional restrictions.
